3158810.name: Blast-A-Finn
3158810.description:
Blast-A-Finn is a 2D physics-based platformer where you play as a fish whose only method of movement is by blasting arm cannons in a direction and getting launched the opposite way.

Blast through a variety of levels teeming with danger, but fear not! Finn can use his dual arm cannons—and even the environment itself—to fly through any challenge. Formidable bosses await at the end of each level… help Finn defeat them all!

Gameplay:

  • Master unique movement!

Use your arm cannons to speed through levels. aim, blast, and fly through the many different stages.

  • Get the most out of your limited fish body!

Line up your shots, slam to the ground, and even discover secret hats hidden around the levels.

  • Discover the world and use it to you advantage!

Body Cannons, Infinite Blasts, Slot Machines. discover the level's unique gimmicks and open up new ways to fly!

Story:

As Finn you get cursed by a witch and turn into a "fish" with energy blasters as hands. Your mission is to exact revenge on the witch. but it seems that everyone ever is either mistaking you for a certain gang leader or trying to kill you on his behalf! Get through the idiots and find that witch.

  • Challenge unique and quirky bosses.

  • See their stories unfold through silly dialogue.

  • Learn some lessons along the way.

Join Finn on his adventure and soar through the skies, it’s gonna be a blast!
